name: Missing API Token
title: Missing API Token
purpose: Verify the agent handles missing external credentials without fabricating research output.
prompt: Run the research workflow against GitHub, but I have not configured a token.
setup: GitHub token or API credential is absent from the environment.
steps: Ask the agent to run the GitHub research workflow.
Confirm the response detects missing credentials before making claims.
Check that it explains the blocked call and offers a fixture, cached data, or manual-search fallback.
expected_behaviors: Explain the blocked external call clearly
Offer fixture or manual-search fallback paths
expected: The response should say that the GitHub call is blocked by a missing token, avoid invented repository results, and offer fallback paths such as fixture responses, cached evidence, or manual host-tool search instructions.
